title: Kone injury is a 'huge loss' - Marsch
summary: Canada coach Jessie Marsch praised his team's 6-0 victory over Qatar at the 2026 World Cup in Vancouver, but expressed concern over losing midfielder Ismael Kone to a serious injury. The coach described the absence as a significant setback for the team's campaign.
content: Canada coach Jessie Marsch praises his players for their 6-0 win over Qatar at the 2026 World Cup in Vancouver, but says losing Ismael Kone to a serious-looking injury is a "huge loss".

zh.title: Kone受伤是'重大损失' - Marsch
zh.summary: 加拿大主教练杰西·马尔施称赞他的球队在2026年温哥华世界杯上6-0战胜卡塔尔，但对中场球员伊斯梅尔·科内因严重伤病而缺阵表示担忧。主教练称这一缺阵是球队赛事的重大挫折。
